title: Not So Shrimple - Remolted
description: A mod which introduces a series of new crustacean and crustacean-adjacent mobs to the world of Minecraft.
body: # About ‘Not So Shrimple - Remolted’ is a mod that introduces a series of crustaceans, molluscs and other shell-adjacent mobs to the world of Minecraft. # Crayfish ![crayfish_demo_2](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9e6a5db6-7785-4e9e-bce8-844b9f91c696) Crayfish are massive aggressive crustaceans with a spiked pincer and crushing claw. They can be found roaming around in swamps and come in a variety of different colors; from an iconic blue to a dreary brown and some might have unique properties. When killed, they have a chance to drop some delicious Prawn Meat, Somber Smithing Stones, and if your lucky they may even drop their Calloused Claw which can be used to craft a powerful weapon. # Maneater Shell ![maneater_shell_demo](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7c8d221a-28a1-4d6b-b4f5-78f30d495fa1) Maneater Shells are 6 legged molluscs that can be found near shipwrecks where they search for bodies to sate their appetite for human flesh. When killed, they have a chance to drop Purging Stones. # Requirements # Plans \*Improve entity behavior / Add new abilities. \*New mobs inspired by other fictional crustaceans. \*Update to 1.21+ : Maybe? Hopefully? Time will tell… # Credits p33ko32213 - Thanks for approving of the unofficial continuation and for creating the original mod alpha\_and\_gec - Special thanks for the creation of the original model and textures
